events.title: IMPULSO - Breathwork
events.desc: Impulso is a somatic practice that uses rhythmic jumping as a gateway, dropping the body and mind below the threshold of thought and into pure presence. From that state, conscious connected breathing flows without effort, guiding participants into deeper altered states of awareness and emotional release. A practice of letting go: no analysis, no performance, just the body, the breath, and what opens when we stop holding on.
